## Summary

What would you like `ros2unbag` to do?

## Use Case

Describe the lab, research, or robotics workflow this would help.

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the expected command, output, or user interaction if you have one in mind.

## Alternatives

List any workaround you currently use.
